title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
